steps.expected: Dashboard loads with Leaderboard showing all experiments
steps.observed: Dashboard loaded with 472 experiments (era=All) across 10 pages of 50

steps.action: Set era to LongMemEval using sidebar dropdown
steps.expected: Leaderboard filters to show only exp_lme_* experiments
steps.observed: Leaderboard shows 114 experiments, all exp_lme_*. No exp_* visible. Pagination: Page 1 of 3.
Confirmed: all visible IDs are exp_lme_0102, exp_lme_0098, exp_lme_0108, etc.

steps.expected: Phase timeline shows only LME phases (7, 8, 9) with data; metric charts show only LME data
steps.observed: Phase timeline bar chart shows Phase 7 (1 exp), Phase 8 (45 exps), Phase 9 (68 exps). Phases 0-6 show 0.5 height (gray, no experiments). Metric progression x-axis ranges from 0 to 31 (LME internal indices). No old-era data present.
Both recall and precision heatmaps have x-axis labels: exp_lme_0000, exp_lme_0002, exp_lme_0003, etc. Shape: 9 thresholds × 104 experiments. No exp_* entries.

steps.expected: Parameter sweep experiment dropdown shows only exp_lme_* experiments
steps.observed: Experiment dropdown contains 104 entries, all exp_lme_*. First entries: exp_lme_0102, exp_lme_0098, exp_lme_0108, etc. No exp_* entries.
Leaderboard shows 358 experiments, all exp_*. No exp_lme_* visible. Sample IDs: exp_0147, exp_0169, exp_0171.

steps.expected: Both eras present, total count matches initial (472)
steps.observed: Leaderboard shows 472 experiments with both exp_* and exp_lme_* visible. Count matches initial.

evidence.network: No API calls — all filtering handled client-side via Dash callbacks on dcc.Store

assertions.title: Era Switching — Hide and Restore Data

steps.action: Record initial state: era=All, row count

steps.expected: Row count matches initial (472), no data leaks
steps.observed: Final count: 472. Both exp_* and exp_lme_* present. Era dropdown shows 'All'.

steps.action: Check browser console for JavaScript errors
steps.observed: No console errors detected after 9 era switches (3 full cycles)

steps.expected: No visual glitches, ghost rows, or stale data
steps.observed: No rendering artifacts observed. Leaderboard renders cleanly after each toggle.

evidence.network: No API calls — all filtering client-side

frictions.description: The status filter dropdown button and era dropdown button have similar appearance and close proximity — clicking the wrong one is easy. The era dropdown is the first button, status is the second.
frictions.resolution: Used agent-browser refs to target specific buttons by index rather than text matching

frictions.description: JavaScript variable declarations persist between eval calls in the same session, causing 'Identifier already declared' errors when re-running code with same variable names
frictions.resolution: Wrapped code in IIFE (function(){...})() to create fresh scope each time

summary: Tested 2 assertions: both passed. VAL-CROSS-001: Era filter propagates consistently across all views (Leaderboard, Timeline & Metrics, Threshold Heatmap, Parameter Sweep) — all views show only the selected era's data with correct experiment counts. VAL-CROSS-004: Three complete cycles of era switching (All→LongMemEval→memories_500→All) × 3 produced clean state with matching counts (472→114→358→472), no console errors, no rendering artifacts.
